title: GlobalFoundries: Aggressive Expansion Paves Path To Double-Digit Growth
text: We analysed GlobalFoundries' business and expansion plans to increase wafer capacity across its Singapore, US and Germany facilities.

title: 2 Semiconductor Stocks to Buy Amid the Automotive Chip Shortage, and 1 to Watch
text: These chip stocks have benefited as a semiconductor shortage hampers the auto sector.

title: NXP Semiconductors: Continued Growth Driven By Automotive Segment
text: Catering to the top 20 automakers, we believe NXP's automotive radar business could continue to benefit from the rise of ADAS features in vehicles. Following its strategic partnership with Foxconn, we expect the deal to bode well for its automotive segment as Foxconn expands its automotive business.

title: NXP Semiconductors Stock (NXPI): Price Increases And 50% Dividend Increase
text: The stock price of NXP Semiconductors NV (NASDAQ: NXPI) increased by 1.34% today. This is why it happened.

title: NXP Semiconductors (NXPI) Q4 Earnings Beat, Revenues Rise Y/Y
